title: P.O.S.E. Datapack - Player-Origin Statue Engine
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cff84301c3f76161d9d6d7972330ab435bdeae40.png)

P.O.S.E. (Player-Origin Statue Engine) is an exciting addition to Minecraft Java Edition, allowing you to create dynamic and customizable statues. Bring your creations to life with unique models, player skins, and a wide selection of pre-designed poses. It even supports all vanilla capes, adding a personal touch to your designs. For an even smoother experience, pair it with Axiom to easily place statues and craft custom poses.

This project is made up of two parts: the resource pack and the data pack. While the data pack isn’t strictly necessary to run P.O.S.E., it adds a lot of helpful functionality. It streamlines statue placement and customization, making it much easier to create and manage your designs. For the best experience, it’s highly recommended to include the data pack alongside the resource pack.

[Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) isn’t required but makes placing your statues much easier. It also lets you copy and paste your statues and provides the ability to create custom poses, giving you even more creative freedom.

Please note that P.O.S.E. is currently under development, with new features and improvements being actively worked on to enhance your experience.
